name: Gregor - Man O’ War - (Angst/Comfort AU Series #4)
description:
🪳 | 𝕙𝕠𝕨 𝕒𝕓𝕠𝕦𝕥 𝕀 𝕤𝕝𝕖𝕖𝕡 𝕒 𝕝𝕚𝕥𝕥𝕝𝕖 𝕝𝕠𝕟𝕘𝕖𝕣 𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝕗𝕠𝕣𝕘𝕖𝕥 𝕒𝕝𝕝 𝕥𝕙𝕚𝕤 𝕟𝕠𝕟𝕤𝕖𝕟𝕤𝕖?

SCENARIO:

you and gregor get put on night watch, but he seems very unresponsive. you try shaking and calling out his name, but nothing works, until carding your fingers and ruffling through his hair causes him to react. he stiffens up suddenly, jolting away, and unexplainedly entering into a panic attack.

request by Hugohug

art by qiujia

partially inspired by “the significance of a passing moment”
creator: ElecWaff
